description_long: This bungalow features a modern, low-profile design with a flat roof and a combination of large glass panels and wood-paneled exterior walls. The front facade is dominated by expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, allowing for ample natural light and a strong connection to the outdoors. The structure is single-story, with a rectangular and slightly irregular footprint, and includes multiple entry points, including a main entrance flanked by two vertical columns. The roof is flat and appears to have several skylights or roof features, while the wood cladding gives the building a warm, contemporary appearance. The windows are arranged in both grouped and individual patterns, with some sections featuring large, uninterrupted glass walls. The overall aesthetic is clean and modern, with a focus on open, airy spaces and a seamless blend of indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, wood-paneled exterior, and large floor-to-ceiling glass windows. The design emphasizes openness, natural light, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with two vertical columns and large windows, highlighting the wood-paneled facade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the irregular footprint, additional windows, and a partial view of the main entrance and roof features.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by expansive floor-to-ceiling glass panels, providing a clear view of the open, modern design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more wood paneling, smaller windows, and the flat roof's features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and expansive glass panels
